textByHashes.1d9aa8c5a013698bbe97ebfb2c7321c581ab4fbc: How dare you insult me like this! You can't kill me! I am the rightful king! Every person here is under my rule!
textByHashes.d296318c2340aa4ee1a973c3d42afd346ba2236e: Then you are all traitors, and you will all pay with your lives!
textByHashes.fe61bbf9a1a8e8bb7cf69006afbe16593bb48496: In the name of Zamorak I curse you, each and every one of you!
